description.overview: An ancient Viking dog, the Norwegian Buhund is an all-purpose farm dog known for their cheerful nature and trainability. They excel in herding and agility.
description.history: The Norwegian Buhund originated in Norway.
description.temperament: Known for being agile, alert, cheerful.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their dense double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An ancient Viking dog, the Norwegian Buhund is an all-purpose farm dog known for their cheerful nature and trainability. They excel in herding and agility.
